testimonials.title: What patients are saying
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from people who switched to smarter healthcare scheduling.

1.quote: I booked a cardiologist in under two minutes. The reminder came exactly when I needed it - no more sitting in waiting rooms guessing my turn.

2.quote: Finding a pediatrician available the same day felt impossible before. This platform shows real slots and the doctor profiles are genuinely helpful.

3.quote: Clean interface, clear fees upfront, and payment through M-Pesa was seamless. It feels like a modern app, not a hospital bureaucracy portal.

4.quote: Rescheduling took seconds. The doctor profiles show everything I need before I book.

5.quote: Finally a healthcare platform that respects my time. Reminders are accurate and helpful.

6.quote: Booked a pediatrician for my daughter on the same day. The whole family now uses mediBook.

7.quote: Transparent pricing and verified doctors gave me confidence to switch from walk-in queues.

8.quote: Telehealth follow-ups saved me a second trip to the hospital. Brilliant experience.

9.quote: The search filters make finding a specialist effortless. Registration was quick and simple.

10.quote: I manage three family members' appointments from one account. Exactly what we needed.

faqIntro.title: Got questions?
faqIntro.subtitle: We've answered the most common questions about booking, payments, reminders, and managing your care on mediBook.

booking.question: How do I book an appointment?
booking.answer: Create a free account, search for a doctor by specialty or name, select an available time slot, and confirm with payment. You'll receive instant confirmation and a reminder before your visit.

cancellation.question: Can I cancel or reschedule?
cancellation.answer: Yes. Visit your dashboard to cancel or reschedule up to 4 hours before your appointment. Refund policies depend on the hospital's terms, which are shown before you confirm.

payment.question: What payment methods are supported?
payment.answer: We support M-Pesa, Mixx by Yas, Airtel Money, HaloPesa, AzamPesa, and Selcom Pay. Payment is processed securely and you'll receive a reference number for your records.

reminders.question: How do appointment reminders work?
reminders.answer: You'll receive an email and web notification 24 hours before your appointment, with a follow-up reminder 2 hours prior. SMS reminders are coming soon.

insurance.question: Do you accept insurance?
insurance.answer: Many partner hospitals accept NHIF and private insurance. Insurance eligibility is shown on each doctor's profile. You can also pay directly via mobile money.

account.question: Who can create an account?
account.answer: Patient accounts can be created freely through our registration page. Doctor accounts are managed by hospital administrators to ensure every profile is verified before going live.

data.question: Is my health data secure?
data.answer: Yes. We use encrypted connections, secure password hashing, and session-based authentication. Your medical records are only visible to you and your treating physicians.

slots.question: What if my preferred slot gets booked?
slots.answer: Only available slots are shown and selectable. If a slot is taken before you confirm, you'll see a clear message to choose another time. We prevent duplicate bookings automatically.

family.question: Can I book for family members?
family.answer: Yes. After registering, you can add family members to your patient dashboard and book appointments on their behalf.

first-visit.question: What should I bring to my first visit?
first-visit.answer: Bring your appointment confirmation, a valid ID, any previous medical records, and your NHIF or insurance card if applicable.
